name: Cincinnati Chili II
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring frequently, until tender (about 6 minutes).
3. Add beef, in batches if necessary, and cook, breaking up with a wooden spoon, until browned.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except spaghetti and cheese. Stir to mix well.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Best if refrigerated overnight.
8. Remove the bay leaf. Reheat gently over medium heat.
9. Serve over hot, drained spaghetti. Top with shredded cheddar cheese.
